ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "book_name" TEXT /* Name of the book */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the book belongs to */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the book */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity for the book */,
  "description" TEXT /* Book description */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Classics, Horror) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography or background information about the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Author's date of birth */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Author's date of death (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Order status (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order this item belongs to */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the book at the time of order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order this payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book this promotion applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Expiration date of the promotion */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code for the promotion (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "inventory_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book whose inventory is being logged */,
  "change_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity change (positive for restock, negative for sales) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change (e.g., sale, restock) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who made the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book this format belongs to */,
  "format_type" TEXT /* Type of format (e.g., ebook, audiobook, hardcover) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the format (in bytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_formats_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book this genre belongs to */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., romance, thriller) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_genres_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)
